data.boss_ai_decision:
STATUS: RISKY. Significant missing data (standings, H2H, model predictions, specific O2.5/BTTS odds) and conflict between odds favoring home team versus away team's superior xG and PPG.

REASON: Away team Deportivo Pasto has better xG (1.42 vs 1.31) and PPG (2.0 vs 1.17), yet odds favor Home team Fortaleza CEIF (2.2 vs 3.44). This discrepancy, coupled with critical data gaps, makes confident analysis impossible.

CONCLUSION: No Bet / Skip
